overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural village at sunset. The character travels along dirt paths past wooden houses and stone walls while the sky displays vibrant golden hour colors transitioning to deep purple.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward distant village towers visible on the horizon

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the right side of the path
tall leafy tree with drooping branches ahead on the path
distant stone towers of a village visible against the sunset sky
open grassy meadow extending to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open countryside during golden hour. A stone wall runs along the right side while grassy fields extend to the left, with village towers visible in the distance against the warm sunset sky.

events.description: path curves right and first wooden village houses come into view
first villagers appear walking ahead on the path in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as wooden village structures appear and the landscape becomes more enclosed

notable_agents.action: villagers walking ahead on the path toward the character

entered.detail: traditional wooden village house with sloped roof
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
wooden house with lit windows visible on the left

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village outskirts as the path curves past wooden houses and fences. Villagers appear in the distance walking toward the camera, and the open fields give way to more enclosed village architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main path lined with wooden fences and houses

events.description: character slows slightly while navigating past villagers on the path
passing through dense village area with close wooden structures and fences

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center passing by villagers and navigating between wooden houses and fences

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden house watching the path
group of villagers walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: tall wooden post with lantern hanging for village lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the heart of the village, passing close to wooden houses and fences while navigating around villagers. The path becomes more enclosed with structures on both sides, and a stone wall reappears on the left side of the path.

events.description: exiting the village back into open fields with stone walls and dense vegetation
sky intensifies to deep pink and purple hues as the sun sets further

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path away from the village into open countryside with long shadows cast by the setting sun

entered.detail: thick green bushes and shrubs lining the right side of the path
tree with white blossoms visible in the field to the left
tall stone tower visible on the horizon against the colorful sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the village behind and enters open countryside with a stone wall running along the left and dense vegetation on the right. The sky displays dramatic pink and purple sunset colors as the path continues toward a distant tower on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the open, golden countryside through a rustic village and back into a deepening twilight landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall and grassy fields, with distant village towers silhouetted against a warm sunset. As the path curves, the open terrain gives way to the village outskirts, where wooden houses and fences enclose the view and villagers appear in the distance. The camera then moves into the heart of the settlement, navigating a tighter corridor of architecture and stone walls before finally emerging back into the open countryside. The scene concludes as the path stretches toward a distant horizon tower, while the sky shifts from golden hues to dramatic pink and purple tones.
